# Thread: a revelation........
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 27
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### caroline — 2013-10-16T10:00:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-97978>

I have been having revelation after revelation the last few days .....I finally started understanding this morning and then went down to the ocean this afternoon and stuff is becoming clear.....

It is going to take me a couple of paragraphs to sort thru this .... so abort when you get bored!

About a month ago I bought myself a titanium bracelet with 8 magnets - 3000 gauss each - facing toward my wrist. I didn't really notice anything I don't think.

About 10 days ago I bought a copper bracelet and I started wearing them both together 24/7 \[they look very cute btw\]

Now, I realise, that my sleep went to crap about that time and my anxiety levels went thru the roof.
I am not an anxious person by nature - at all - so was blaming JK and his blogs and the last 2 webinars!!
I just kept thinking that I want to understand all this detail so badly and that is what is doing it.
This was so unlike me - I always want to do really well and give 110% but I always know when to back of
and cut myself some slack.

I was seriously anxious and even thought maybe I should go to see my Doc.

Three days ago I stopped using my ipad and less computer time, no TV etc. - still couldn't sleep. Two nites ago same thing .... I got up in the middle of the night and I was seriously ticked and started thinking ---something else is doing this. For some reason - it hit me like a ton of bricks - I took of the bracelets - flung them on the floor and went back to bed and to sleep.

Last night I got nice and drowsy and went to bed - still didn't fall asleep that easy but then slept like a ton of bricks! When I got up this morning - I realised I had forgotten to turn off the breaker and ,coincidently,
have realised lately that a second breaker turns off the outlets - which are right next to my head!

So - tonite will be interesting....

So many things tie together - I think - I need Sally's imput here \[both of them!

Are the copper and the titanium and magnets together working against me? I was wearing them on my right wrist. My laptop wrist.......so was I drawing EMF towards me - in record high numbers?
My right shoulder and arm have been sore lately - I thought it was an exercise I was doing for my upper arm. I have also felt slightly off balance and less energy.

Now - we come to my disaster at the beach the other day.

If I was getting off the chart EMF exposure - I would have been extremely dehydrated and losing magnesium by the bucket load ....also explains why I was going to the toilet all nite long.

So many things have come into focus - some things Dr. K. said in the comments of EE#6. I re read it today and other comments elsewhere.

Does this seem plausible?

Today I just had to go to the ocean - I am desperate to recharge my batteries. I have been craving and eating fat like crazy.

Something really funny....my dear friend was so upset with me for going to the ocean on such a hot day and said to me yesterday "What has Dr. Kruse been telling you??? hasn't he been telling you about the donut hole ...why aren't you listening to him????\]

It is pretty funny when my friends are quoting Dr. K. to me.....

### Destiny — 2013-10-16T14:01:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-97985>

I had a positive experience with the Titanium magnet bracelet. I think, it completely got rid off my sore shoulder. I had a sore shoulder for over a year and the cold was helping but the aching was always there. I started wearing the bracelet and in a month the pain was completely gone. I also got the magnetic sleep pad at the same time so maybe it was not the bracelet but the pad. Not sure.

### cantweight — 2013-10-16T14:10:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-97986>

I have yet to understand the magnetism....probably why I am so cautious about them. I can barely stand to lay on my sons bed with the magnetico. But I am one of those that believes the body often rejects what it needs most.

Were the bracelets meant to be worn together? Maybe that was the issue...they were fighting and taking you down with them...

I wish for you some damn good sleep tonight

### nicld — 2013-10-16T16:40:48+0300

Very interesting. Hope someone can shed light on this. Maybe sometimes doing too much is not a good thing.

I increased my inflammation, and the nearby elbow and shoulder started to get misaligned, become painful, etc. Not sure about any anxiety, but I was wondering why my hs-CRP got worse.

Interesting that the copper had such a dramatic effect. (Sally eyes her gold wedding band with suspicion.) Perhaps it was the fact that there were three metals in close proximity?

### nonchalant — 2013-10-17T03:50:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98069>

I think anxiety might be an early symptom for you. Watch for it and realize it probably indicates a problem.

### caroline — 2013-10-17T05:55:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98086>

> [nonchalant said:](/goto/post?id=98069)
>
> I think anxiety might be an early symptom for you. Watch for it and realize it probably indicates a problem.

Sally - I have never had anxiety like that before - ever .....even thru all the stuff with my DH. It actually really scared me.

I am thinking it must be really serious dehydration - hence - my episode at the beach....I couldn't make sense of that because it happened so fast - but that is what the lifeguards kept saying... and you know that cutie-pie life guards know everything...LOL

I don't completely understand the copper thing tho.... that was a common thing to wear years ago - JK did talk about that in the webinar.

What confuses me .... in my mind ... JK was saying that pieces of metal deflect EMF away from you - but when they are in particle form they attract it to you.

What have I missed ....I know that is a loaded question .......LOL

so - I guess - it isn't the titanium and magnets and the copper .... It is just the copper?
This is such a cute bracelet - and I wouldn't even want to give it to anyone .... now that I know better .....

But .... when you sleep on a magnetico - your whole body is on the field - so I really don't understand .....a magnetic bracelet for instance -------you are pulling the field towards you at the area touching - but what happens outside that area?

I am going to take off all Jewelry ....even my Cartier rolling ring that my DH bought me - sob....

Could I just be that sensitive? or am I getting much more sensitive for some reason?

Maybe, once again, I have answered my own question........I am much more sensitive to food now....

so - do we kinda get in a zone \[for want of a better word\] when we are eating epi-paleo and limiting EMF and blue lite and drinking spring water and following circadian cycles .... and when we move outside that zone - we now react negatively to seemingly little diversions from "the path".

I think that makes sense ... we are way more tuned in......and notice things that would not have been on our radar before.

### caroline — 2013-10-17T06:00:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98087>

I just moved my rolling ring to my left hand - I am in transition....... and I am taking off my little diamond earrings that my DH gave me for my birthday 15 yrs ago and have never taken off....

This is a traumatic day ..... and I am being serious this time .... I think I will go for a nap and sleep it off...

### prAna303 — 2013-10-17T13:00:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98123>

Something i always had thoughts about...

How do we eat our foods? Using metal is the normal way today, perhaps okey many years ago but now with all iGadgets and other EMF storms around us.

Today many eats next to a computer, iGadget or TV... Would not the cutlery act like a wonderful antenna?

Just something i have tried to avoid for many years now. I eat with tools made of wood or with bare hand.

### Hemming — 2013-10-17T13:08:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98125>

Strangely, I've had an actual desire to eat with my bare hands for the last six months. Especially when I'm eating something with bones in it (I know it can be easier too in that situation) but in general I do it too. I really like eating flatribs or whole fish withmy hands. Some people have noticed it and say that I shouldn't eat all of the tendons, tissue etc. on e.g. a flatrib but I say that I really like it and then they feel a little sorry for me since I'm not eating the 'pure' meat. Its all in the best of intentions they say given my situation

### prAna303 — 2013-10-17T13:18:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98126>

> then they feel a little sorry for me since I'm not eating the 'pure' meat.

Rather funny, when a wild animal often get a prey they aim for the hearts and brains. Seen it many times and bears often just munch on the middle part of the fish, they go for the intestines.

I think in this world of man made foods the real ones seems dirty and strange tasting. We have cleaned up the meat so no fat or anything else remains, like photoshop for foods... The modern food is a super model today.

### Hemming — 2013-10-17T13:30:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98128>

Yep, I see this constantly. When I ask a butcher for the offal even they look at me like I'm a freak. I like to eat absolutely everything from the animal and think that its a shame to throw out something perfectly edible. Here in Denmark I still haven't found a butcher who will sell me the brain and stomach/tripe to me. This is partly why I still have a dream of starting a farm and living of the land. As I mentioned another place I picked up 8kg of fish bones for free with so much meat still left on them that I have enough food for a week. Some of it wasn't even bones but just 'the other side' of a filet they had cut.
A funny story relating to this. One day I had heart for breakfast and ate it with my hands. I didn't realise that I had the juices from it all over my face before I went to the bathroom in the airport after passing security and talking to a couple of people.

Audrey, you made my eyes smart with those comments about removing earrings, rings... I know it would be a tough thing to do.

I agree about your comparison to food sensitivities and EMF sensitivity. I have never had a problem with my throat tightening up before. Who was it who noticed their heart beating faster at an intersection with power lines? And now I can't stay on the computer for 30 minutes without my eyes complaining. I think some of these sensitivities were there before, but the symptoms were lost in our huge collection of other symptoms. But other symptoms are new, yes, like your mega anxiety. Your experience, that you rationalized as concern over the blogs, has actually helped me see that my sister is anxious. Yesterday it had been raining for a couple days, and during my visit she was complaining about the usual stuff more than normal. Now I realize that the lack of sun was decreasing her power even more, with the resultant increase in anxiety.

Yes, I remember that copper and zinc need to be balanced in the body, not too much, not too little. But external copper, I'll have to think about that.

### Shijin13 — 2013-10-17T18:00:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/a-revelation.8464/post-98161>

This is such an amazing thread. I made a realization on my RC this morning. that when we're in the moment, we can intuitively identify things that may occur and impact us, either negatively or positively.

taking off your earrings, and rings really resonates w/me Audrey. As I don't wear my rings at home, and up until I' started working a desk job - I NEVER work rings or watches - b/c when your work in a warehouse or flight line environment - they can easily catch and you can loose a finger or a hand. It bugs DH that I don't wear my rings all the time. I will when we go out in public for events, but running around town etc - I just don't.

I've got diamond stud earrings that I saved my own money to buy and I wear them daily. The reality is I should take them out and let the holes close up. but what to do with that... I now look at all my friends who've pierced their infant daughters ears and wonder WFT are we doing to our children? Chaos does not have pierced ears, and we made a rule that if she wants them she has to be at least 13, but before that we'll talk about how the metal in the ears could be a very bad thing, and why.

The piercings also have me wondering about nose piercings and how that may just be a directional sign for emf to shoot up the nasal cavity to the vortex of the brain.. uggh No wonder some of my friends have such off kilter thoughts - they're directing the EMF straight to their brain and overloading the system...

# Thread: eating while on the road?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Julie5 — 2013-10-16T15:50:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-97993>

I have always been a stay at home sort of person, but a couple of times a month I have to be gone for the whole day. I can't afford to always eat in restaurants, and in fact don't like restaurant food. Since being on the leptin RX, I am having a hard time figuring out what is really portable food without a microwave. Cold hamburger patties and fish don't float my boat.

While I was gone yesterday, I was in Costco and knew I had to have something since it was late afternoon and I hadn't eaten since 6:30 am. I ended up with cheese, tomatoes and macadamia nuts. It wasn't a rootbeer float, at least, but it wasn't optimal.

So what do the rest of you do when you are on the road or away from your kitchen?

### nicld — 2013-10-16T16:37:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-97997>

When I travel for work or pleasure I always make some beef jerkey with. If you can find some good tuna packets, those might do in a pinch. I have a supplier that when I visit them, I always have to bring my own food since they have never once asked if anyone has food allergies. Either I brought my own food or I would not eat. Kinda why when I travel for work I make sure to find a hotel that has a hot breakfast with eggs so i can at least eat a good filling breakfast. And when I am in a real pinch I will get an Arby's roast beef with no bun.

### Gracelind — 2013-10-16T21:44:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98032>

About restaurant breakfast I've heard scrambled may be from dried egg powder or may have dried milk powder added. Better to order poached or sunny side up/over easy.

I'm sure it depends on the place--fastfood vs upscale hotel.

### caroline — 2013-10-16T23:28:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98043>

Do you take along coconut oil - for BPC? cans of sardines, coconut manna, dark chocolate, brazil nuts, nori sheets to roll up some canned salmon........

### SeaHorse — 2013-10-17T00:21:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98052>

You might check out some earlier threads on this forum....there were a lot of good ideas tossed around.

### nonchalant — 2013-10-17T02:11:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98060>

And there's always pork jerkey.

### BJK77 — 2013-10-17T16:47:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98156>

For day trips, I always make sure to have a can of sardines and/or smoked oysters with me. I check out the area where I'm traveling ahead of time too to see if there are any decent sushi restaurants - sashimi always works and most places will let me add a side of avocado. If there's a Whole Foods Market where you're traveling, they'll shuck fresh oysters for you or steam shrimp. Epic bars are another option. They taste fantastic and I always keep one in my purse for 'emergencies.'

For overnight travel I only stay in hotels with kitchens so I can pack a cooler and prepare my own food.

I travel often for work and I finally feel like I'm getting the hang of this!

### Julie5 — 2013-10-18T07:04:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eating-while-on-the-road.8465/post-98230>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=98043)
>
> Do you take along coconut oil - for BPC? cans of sardines, coconut manna, dark chocolate, brazil nuts, nori sheets to roll up some canned salmon........

Does the seaweed taste fishy? I'll gag if it does. And I'm not sure I can get past the sardine heads {shudder}. What is coconut manna?

# Thread: Robert O. Becker
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/robert-o-becker.8469/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Awainer1 — 2013-10-16T19:16:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/robert-o-becker.8469/post-98018>

Has anyone here read any of his books? I read Cross Currents and now I'm reading The Body Electric. This one is amazing and really explains a lot of the science that Jack talks. For example it explains how he discovered semiconduction using the Hall Effect. I never thought id be a science person but I am turning into one. He also talks about how much dogma he had to face in doing his work. I have a lot of time to read at work so I'm making sure to go slow, underline and really understand it. Fascinating stuff.

### Awainer1 — 2013-10-16T21:37:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/robert-o-becker.8469/post-98030>

"When Becker found piezoelectric current in bone, we had a game changer moment in biology. \*The analogy I like to use is think about when Neil Armstrong landed on the moon and made his famous statement about mankind, and then visualize or make believe that no one \*bothered watching TV that day in 1969."

Lol and now this statement from emf 8 makes a lot more sense to me.

### NeilBB — 2013-10-16T21:49:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/robert-o-becker.8469/post-98035>

You can walk into any Barnes and Noble today and buy a copy of "The Body Electric." It received lots of good reviews and is well respected. Yet the details of the science contained in there are: (1) crucial, (2) revolutionary, and (3) still completely ignored by relevant medical research communities. Becker's descriptions of the politics of the process of scientific research and its funding (also contained in the book) help explain why this is so.

Scientific paradigms have a life of their own and are incredibly difficult and slow to change. Truth is less important than "measured orderly stability" in social institutions. That is a fact, whether people want to face it or not. Revolutions in science are often socially, politically, and economically destabilizing and are therefore resisted with great fury by those in power. We should expect this.

I don't think Becker really set out to be a revolutionary. It seems that he was just a very intelligent and determined doctor/scientist who was unflinchingly committed to finding the truth, wherever it led him. This comes through in the book. I work in academic medicine and I can tell you that those qualities are exceedingly rare in organized medical science today. Any researcher exhibiting such qualities and proposing a view that fundamentally conflicted with orthodoxy would either be drummed out of the field or would be aggressively "mentored" into studying "more appropriate" scientific topics that fit within the current mold.

That is also why this brilliant and revolutionary website is run by a man who is in private medical practice and not formally affiliated with academic medicine. It just has to be that way today.

### Awainer1 — 2013-10-16T21:53:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/robert-o-becker.8469/post-98037>

Wow I just read all of the quantum bone blog after reading the first 130 pgs of "The Body Electric" and so many lightbulbs are turning on for me. Got to keep reading!

Here's the quick story: Jaw injury when I was 19...lots of TMJ issues with no real understanding of how the disc was degenerating over the next thirty or so years. After early menopause (alarm bells ringing now) the disc and the bone started going south very fast. Two years ago I couldn't really open my mouth fully and was in a lot of pain and I started losing my bite due to the joint changing shape and hinging differently. So since starting JK protocols I've stopped my bone degeneration (YAY!!!) and now I'm in braces to straighten teeth and prepare for surgery next summer. I will be CTing like crazy all winter, minding the light, hormone support, doing all the good stuff and hopefully surgery and it's attending awfulness of emf, invasive metal, etc. etc....won't set me back too far. I really need to be able to chew properly and I can't which could be behind some of the gut issues I've had too (JK lightbulb moment in a consult)....I can't regain this ability without surgery and I hope I will be much healthier next summer to undergo surgery...there you have it, how about you bb?

So since starting JK protocols I've stopped my bone degeneration (YAY!!!) and now I'm in braces to straighten teeth and prepare for surgery next summer. Thank you for sharing Sea Horse, I can definitely sympathize! Iâ€™ve always had anterior open bite which wasnâ€™t a problem. I did have braces in Uni to straighten my teeth. Then an idiot dentist over-tightened my jaw during a cleaning and it LOCKED. Pain was relentless, I couldnâ€™t open my mouth, chew or speak for 6 months. My mother pureed all my meals. All the specialists said surgery only option but I met a TMJ specialist who saved my life. He used combination of techniques, mouth guard, cranial retainer, osteo work, chiro work, etc to get me functional. I was doing better than I had in years and just waiting to have funds to straighten teeth again. Then was in huge car crash, smashed my head, back to mouth guard etc etc. Once again surgeons are saying surgery the only way.... But my TMJ and lyme specialist are telling me it is last resort and theyâ€™re confident that I can avoid breaking bone.

Also recently has been mentioned to me that each of our teeth is connected to a particular brain circuit. And the unfortunate impact of braces can be to shut some of those down and that can lead to a host of other issues. So maybe when youâ€™re teeth are nice and straight you can have that checked out just to make sure those pathways are firing optimally
Sorry to ramble on, but as you can see this is such a huge part of my life haha

# Thread: sleep wanted
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-wanted.8471/>
**Subforum:** The Leptin Rx
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Julie5 — 2013-10-16T20:21:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-wanted.8471/post-98022>

Shortly after finding Jack Kruse, i had bunch of labs done because of my serious insomnia. I'm now on a couple dozen supplements and a few prescriptions, all designed to boost my bod and ability to sleep. I sleep on a Nikken mag mattress, use amber goggles night and morning, shut off the power to our bedroom/bath, and will start CT this week. i have gone from sleeping just 4 hours a night to 5. That's progress, I suppose.

Will my sleep continue to improve and will I eventually be able to get off the sleep scripts if I keep up the leptin rx and ct?
I am desperate for good sleep!

### Shijin13 — 2013-10-16T20:29:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-wanted.8471/post-98025>

yes your sleep will improve as you balance Light, Water and Magnetism, by paying attention to the natural circadian cycles. It may take slow weaning to get off the sleep medications, though...

### nicld — 2013-10-16T21:41:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-wanted.8471/post-98031>

Yep, it should. Mine has but it has taken time and I am hoping that since winter is coming it will get better my making sure I minimize artifical night time light. I think it is working for the hubby too but he has never really had a problem falling asleep. Hang in there, it will get better.

### Hemming — 2013-10-16T21:48:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-wanted.8471/post-98034>

Your sleep will be better. But more so, you'll be sleepy in the evening when it gets dark and wake up in the morning when the sun rises basically following the circadian cycle.

# Thread: Quantum Physics, Quantum Biology, Quantum Thoughts & Quantum Actions
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quantum-physics-quantum-biology-quantum-thoughts-quantum-actions.8472/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Shijin13 — 2013-10-16T21:12:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quantum-physics-quantum-biology-quantum-thoughts-quantum-actions.8472/post-98028>

In searching for something to add back into my daily meditations, I've been re-reading a book that profoundly impacted me when I first read it back in 2006.

The book is called Mindlight -by Sliver Raven Wolf.

the following is an excerpt "...we have the capability of "clicking" matter on and off, thereby creating our own reality, and that everyone has this natural ability."

"One... means that in the still point of the void, that place that is not a place, in a time that is not a time, the zero point of the totality of the dynamics... there are none - which is one- united in nothing, yet bonded in everything, wholeness in the moment where there is no past nor present."

"Once we agree with the four parts of our selves "in here" (mental, physical, emotional, spiritual) then there is no barrier to "out there". We move smoothly into the power of the One, without any visible effort, without resistance, without emotional attachments, without negativity."

I found this is resonating where Jack is taking us. Thoughts can change your DNA. Where you live matters, how the field impacts us. But we haven't discussed how our if our thoughts can change DNA, our thoughts can also change the field. our DNA is part of the quantum world, so is the field (both native and non-native) So that means my thoughts can change it. As Silver Raven Wolf discusses how to make reality change through the thought of something either being present or not being present. She's changing her reality by saying the following about an item " its there, its not there, its there"
I find this fascinating. I plan on seeing if I can show a change in the field just by changing the reality with thought and measure with meters.

the book also inspired me to write down and begin practicing the following meditation which I chant whenever I find my self stressed about stuff to the point, it interrupts what I should be focused on in that given moment

"I am a Quantum Being
my thoughts, actions & beliefs
support my Quantumness
I am physically, emotionally,
mentally, & spiritually
in alignment with my
Quantum Being
My thoughts can change DNA
My thoughts influence my environment
My thoughts influence positive outcomes
for me & those around me
As a Quantum Being, I
control the present as I see it
and the future as I shape it.
The Energy of the Universe
is mine to use."

### caroline — 2013-10-16T23:32:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quantum-physics-quantum-biology-quantum-thoughts-quantum-actions.8472/post-98044>

I love that Gretchen .... thanks for sharing.....I am desperate to make changes ....I am borrowing this!

Hey folks!

Wanted to remind all of you about the FREE Community Wide Q&A with Jack tonight (10/16) at 7pm CDT.

You should have received an email with all of the info, but just in case here it is.

Because of the issues we've had delivering video over the net, we've partnered with a new company that will allow you to access our monthly Q&As from your computer or from your phone line. [Click here to watch the video we've created to show you how Start Meeting works so you can join our calls.](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=26uTB7uIiC8&feature=youtu.be)

1.  If you want to join the Q&A using your computer's mic and speaker, you will need to download the [Start Meeting software](https://www.startmeeting.com/wall/604-241-419).
2.  If you want to join the Q&A on your phone, call the toll free number and enter the meeting ID and pin:

-   Toll Free Number: (855) 212-0212
-   Meeting ID: 604-241-419
-   Pin 9229

If you need help, click here for the [Start Meeting Help Center](http://www.startmeeting.com/faq).

We hope you can make it! We are really looking forward to it.

\-Team Kruse

# Thread: beginning labwork

**Subforum:** Optimal Labs
**Posts:** 1

### Rick — 2013-10-17T03:46:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/beginning-labwork.8475/post-98068>

Hello all,

Oct 15th I saw Dana Cohen in Manhattan from the PPN but I wanted to ask if anyone on JK forum might have some insights as well: thyroid panel shows T3 at 4.2 out of 4.4 and T3 is 34 times > rT3 after scaling the units. HS-CRP is .71 mg/l but Pg/E2 ratio is fine but progesterone is quite low and the ratio is only good because estradiol is extremely low. Cortisol diurnal profile is generally the right shape curve and even tho' midnight is relatively elevated, all four samples are on the edge or below the shaded areas for low med & high (noon is way low, below shaded curve).

I was expecting pregnenolone steal because T levels are low with long term hypogonadism but the low cortisol would suggest adrenal fatigue?

Yes Dr. Cohen will order a boatload of more labs to pin this down, but any comments or suggestions from here would be much appreciated!

Thanks, Rick H.

PS, any hackers out there, just let me know if u want to see all the exact numbers, I have the files from LEF.org and ZRT labs on request...

### Rick — 2013-10-17T04:42:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/opioid-peptides-in-gliadin-and-casein.8476/post-98073>

So I'm wondering if anyone could shed some light on these exorphins that allegedly create the mild euphoria especially when eating wheat and dairy together, like classic comfort foods such as mac & cheese, pizza, fettucine al fredo etc...

Is it necessary to have EMF involved for these peptides to break the intestinal brush border and the BBB to hit our opioid receptors? How could we test this now since presumably all modern humans have been chronically exposed to high freq RF signals so we all have membranes that are somewhat permeable at least. Impossible to design an experiment that separates our diet from our environment now?

Can we blame these foods alone for their addictive nature, that is to say, prior to 1895? Or do we know empirically that these foods were addictive long before Marconi due to the permanent transition from HGs to agriculturists? Aside from the social pressures to develop stable communities, specialization of work, commerce and the arts, was there also chemical persuasion to give up the hunter gatherer life for settling down to cultivate grains, beans and potatoes?

Just curious if any moderators or admins would care to weigh-in on this topic...

RH

And I do not even have that much EMF in my home. Do you have metal in you mattress Audrey? I would immediately throw it out and buy a non metal mattress, like latex or such. And I think you will have to move. You need to come away from all those wifi's and antennas, to a place close to the ground a little bit away from city. I bet the rent is cheaper there too!
Audrey dear, you can do this

### caroline — 2013-10-18T09:39:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/free-community-wide-q-a.8477/post-98242>

Inger - I am fine - really.....thanks for your concern.

My mattress is latex .. no springs. I live in a very old area - so lots of trees and grass and flowers and many, many birds and very close to the ocean.......

the TV is a comfort thing ....it gets very lonely in the evenings...... but I don't watch very much anyway ... but I guess I shouldn't at all.

You live in close proximity to your family - it is very different when you are all alone....and on your own.....

### Inger — 2013-10-18T09:55:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/free-community-wide-q-a.8477/post-98243>

Oh, that is great new about your mattress Audrey. Sound so beautiful where you live. I am still worried about all the wifi signals you get into your apartment, or do I remember wrong.. could be for sure.
I understand the lonely thing for sure. Maybe you can start exercise entertaining yourself?  I do that a lot, that is why I love to be alone. I love those lonely evening hours.... you can do art, or sing, or read. There are so many books out there I would love to read but never have time! It is so nice to read by candle light! Maybe you can sit down in the park evenings, where no fake light are, and take a oil lamp with you and read under a tree until you get ready for bed... then put your glasses on and go upstairs to sleep  That way you are not lonely too, because you are with the birds and the trees and all!  Maybe you feel lonely in your apartment because you have cut yourself out from the nature? I at least feel never lonely when in the wild... ever.
And you could get a cat.

### QuantumRadical — 2013-10-19T21:55:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/free-community-wide-q-a.8477/post-98352>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=98235)
>
> Randy ... so you find all this pretty easy??? Do you work in a connected field? I don't think I told you .... on the Q&A - Dr. K. spoke briefly about you and your twin.....
>
> so - you can be distilling all this info for us "non geeks" ??????
>
> you don't sound like a geek..............

AC (Audrey/Caroline), I hide the geek in me pretty easily. I don't find this easy or hard, just absolutely fascinating--breaks the dogma we all believed in for so long. If you get really interested in something, you just find the time to figure it out. I wish I was working in a connected field, but right now I am not. At 60 society limits what is available to you--so I am trying to figure it out--would love to go get a PhD in BioPhysics and have put some thought into how to do that at age 60. I would also love to do applied R&D in this whole area too, but government agencies tend to put up barriers no matter how much they say they are looking for new ideas and innovation. And without a PhD or MD you automatically lack credibility. I always looked for enthusiasm and attitude first--degrees, not so much--when I hired people. But, .... Bureaucracy is what it is. I have always been pretty good at taking very complex topics or issues and distilling them down to the "actionable" essence. Jack is a master at this as well. His protocols are very straightforward but the implications are profound if you follow them- or not. I ramble.

I may get some time to listen to the webinar soon so I can see what Jack said about me and my bro'!

### caroline — 2013-10-20T00:16:22+0300

Randy - I was just talking to a man the other day at the beach - he was in his sixties and had just gotten a PhD.

We used to know a man In Canada that owned a multi national company. He had escaped from Hungary with just the clothes on his back. We always talked about this kind of stuff. He always said - "give me someone with enthusiasm and a great attitude and I will teach him everything else.

You are a lovely, caring man with tons of energy  .......the world is still your oyster .....I think your life will take a very unexpected twist and you will be on the adventure of a lifetime ...

follow the dude with the flashlight .......I suspect he is far from done.....

# Thread: monthly webinars and Q&A

**Posts:** 1

### caroline — 2013-10-17T08:58:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/monthly-webinars-and-q-a.8480/post-98110>

I just wanted to make the comment that I get so, so much out of the monthly webinars and Q&A. I really appreciate all the effort that goes into them.

Dr. K. puts so much into the webinar each month ...and he is willing to answer any question you want to ask him in the Q&A.

I certainly don't have excess funds .....but these webinars bring the blogs to life in so many ways.

You can read and read and read again the blogs ..... but to hear Dr. K. talk about all the things he is so passionate about and all the knowledge he has accumulated over the years and all his research to bring this to all of us ..... I wouldn't miss it for anything ...as far as I am concerned they are a huge part of this journey.

BTW.... just so you know .... I have no vested interest in this ..... only that all the diverse and amazing and talented people on this forum - all of us - find our optimum.

It has been a great ride so far .... and getting better and better...

Do you have a favorite webinar? I have spoken often enough about what mine is .... what is yours? What was your take home?

# Thread: Raw Animal Food. Detox or Bad Reaction?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/>
**Subforum:** The New Monster Thread
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### seanb4 — 2013-10-17T12:31:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-98122>

Hi guys,

I have been eating bits of raw mackerel recently with other food and it went okay. However Tuesday night I ate full raw meal for tea (makerel and sprats) and the following morning I ate the same meal again. Then roughly 5hrs later I felt sick, weak, and stronger heart palpitations than usual. It felt exactly like the "detox" I felt when fasting.
By the time tea came around I was sort of repulsed by the idea of eating raw, and was still feeling sick. I ate some cooked stuff anyway to get my calories up. Felt like crap rest of the night and awoke this morning with even less appitiate than usual and a headache. Forced myself to eat the same raw fish again but this time I did not enjoy the taste at all.

Is the raw fish causing detox? Has anyone else experienced detox from switching to raw foods? Did it happen this quick?

Is it the sudden lack of carbs? Doubtful, I have gone from moderate carb to zero before with no such symptoms.

Had the fish contained parasites/bacteria?

Sean.

### caroline — 2013-10-18T00:06:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-98180>

I think parasites can be a problem with fish.....I hope someone else can help you out here......

### Inger — 2013-10-18T10:21:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-98250>

Sean I can only speak for myself and my own experiences, but I never had such issues, and believe me I have been eating raw fish with even parasites in it! But, I do believe when the field is altered as Jack says... and the gut is not healthy... there can be issues. Say, if you have too little stomach acid, that cannot kill the parasites, and you get sick.

Try some wormwood, drink some very strong tea! Maybe 2 cups of it. Make your raw fish with lots of raw organic grated ginger and lemon juice / apple cider vinegar. These things helps with parasite issues. Eat safe fish/seafood with no parasites, or freeze them for minimum 2 weeks, very cold.

If your gut and stomach acid are not healthy you might need to be careful. And, the most important thing, avoid EMF! Ground a lot barefeet in the grass! Put icepacks on your abdomen, do CT, no fake light etc. Those all counts a lot when healing

I am going to write a "cook book" with raw animal foods only, will also address this issue. I will send you one when it is ready, ok! I am going to print it but I can send you the whole thing as an email it does not cost a thing

### seanb4 — 2013-10-18T17:34:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-98273>

Okay so thursday night I was feeling less shit and had some cooked salmon. I only had a bit because my appatiet had dropped. Total calories for the day was probably <1000.

This morning was no longer feeling sick, bloating was slightly reduced (this was probably thanks to less volume going in my stomach) but still feeling even more tired than usual. I ate a whole mackerel minus head and tail this morning. Wasn't exactly tasty but not off putting either. It had been in the fridge for 3days. Anyone know roughly how many calories that is? Protein to fat ratio?
I don't feel nauseous at the moment so I think whatever it was has passed.

I will probably just have a bit of cooked salmon for tea again.
Does anyone know how much raw food affects your appetite? I have heard it lowers it somewhat which could be very useful to me.

@Inger
Yeah I was also thinking that raw paleo is probably fine for people with healthy guts but risky otherwise. I don't think I need wormwood as whatever happened seems to have passed. I am interested in using apple cider vinegar however at the moment I just want to see what results I get from just raw, ACV could mess up the experiment. Also does this not denature the proteins or something? Is this bad or not?

Would love a copy of your "cook" book, Thanks!

### seanb4 — 2013-10-25T20:48:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-99029>

So I have had another bad experience with raw beef this time...

Wednesday I ate raw marrow, raw beef and raw beef fat. I felt nauseus and sick again but that seemed to go away however I am also experiencing a pain in my stomach that feels like something is stuck in there which hasn't gone away yet. It comes and goes usually when I am eating or when drinking water and at night and is quite painful.

It is difficult to describe like a pin point heaviness just 1 or 2 inches below my sternum. It woke me up last night/morning, was slightly present after breakfast, came back after I drunk some water, and is now present (I just ate).

Is this a parasite/bacteria?

Anyone else had something similar?

Could it be the fibre from the large chunks of beef I was bolting down is still stuck in my stomach? I was chewing the raw beef however it wasn't doing anything so I ended up swallow large chucks.

Any help is appreciated.

### seanb4 — 2013-10-27T20:12:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-99166>

So the new stomach heaviness pain is still here but is reduced however now I have a stabby stomach pain, feel even more ill than usual, I've been having foul flatus and BMs have been more "wet".

I'm going to post pone raw eating until this goes away. Do you think it's is like mild food poisoning?

### Inger — 2013-10-27T20:46:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-99171>

I have no clue Sean. Are you eating high quality meat, grassfed or wild/game? Might be as long as you have so many gut issues you need to do only best quality. I myself can eat pretty much anything raw... and I have no issue at all. But I think my digestion works very well. And I am living pretty low EMF too.

If you are afraid of parasites, take wormwood tea, it can also help with digestion issues. You can also get a pill from a drug store I guess, it is a easy thing I think? Or try raw ginger too. Maybe do not take too much notice either... maybe take an enema and see if the foul flatuses disappear. It is kinda hard to know as you do not give too much information what you do in your day and what exactly you eat, how much and when... maybe you will share?

I do not think apple cider vinegar is bad, you can as well use lemon juice too. But take care they are both organic. I think both are traditionally used to help digestion and kill parasites.. also the ginger. Your gut & digestion is not optimal yet it seems so you might need to help it a little?

### seanb4 — 2013-10-28T10:18:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raw-animal-food-detox-or-bad-reaction.8482/post-99232>

I am eating the meat from the local market place so I don't know it's origin.

Basically for roughly the last 2 weeks I have been eating a whole raw fish in the mornings, minus head and tail, then cooked food at night. But yea I'm not sure eating raw will help me too much anyway because as I mentioned in the other thread I started, I don't think it's the contents of food I consume is the problem, I think the way my stomach acts to anything is.

I might have to get some wormwood but I will see if it goes away itself.

I think it is mild food poisoning, I was up all night with really bad stabbing and cramping gut pains, and diarrhoea which lasted through the night and is still in effect now.

# Thread: Lava
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 36
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Lava — 2013-10-17T21:34:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98173>

I begin my journal admitting to myself that it has taken me almost 2 years to write this stuff down...My journey begins as the youngest child in a military family. The odd "redheaded" child..As a child I had several kidney infections and was hospitalized at the age of 5 (same hospital Jackie Kennedy was at) with an unknown virus. I was given mega doses of gamma globulin. Several years past and all I can recall is skin rashes, warts, those kinds of things..Had an early pregnancy. tubal ligation at the age of 20. No regrets. He is now 38 years old with an arthritic back and neuropathy. Anyway, back to me.. I ended up with large fibroids in my uterus and breasts. I had my uterus removed..Kept the ovaries. A few years later I am diagnosed with Hep C after many years of complaining of fatigue...I cleared the virus after 4 months on interferon..I am still clear. That was 12 years ago..I still carry around a huge ball and chain of fatigue. I have been from doctor to doctor...One (woman doctor) told me I was just getting old...WOW..
Finally I see an anti-aging doctor who took the time to measure my thyroid and adrenals and iron...she plasters me with HC and synthetic thyroid meds which of course I had a bad reaction to. (I guess I forgot to mention I am major chemical sensitive) Also she said I had recurring EBV. My glands were swollen, vertigo, the whole works. I could not get out of bed...My body started breaking out in basal cell carcinomas and warts..I am covered now. gross....tmi tmi....AND THEN I stumble across this webpage..It's been almost 2 years..The minute I stopped being a vegetarian things started to open up for me....I started with the Leptin rx and leaky gut..Wow, who knew!!! I then started on the adrenal rx..About this time I also began learning how screwed up my circadian rhythm was. So I did all of that. Now I sleep. There are no artificial lights at our house now. Also FYI, the Big Island doesn't have blue lights because of the telescopes on Mauna Kea. We live in the country so no wi-fi from other sources and we unplug the wi-fi at night. The magnetico sleep pad is unbelievable...I am just now starting to drop the weight I gained from the HC.. My thyroid is getting optimal. Still low t4..adrenals are dicey, still up and down. iron is back up to optimal, shape of my red blood cells still iffy, kidney functions still hovering low, hormone panel still sucks. My Ana is still high and now the pattern is speckled along with the homogen? (can't remember the word) No diagnosis on anything. All other labs are optimal.. I no longer see doctors unless I am bleeding to death.
One thing I forgot to add to this journal is the fact that when we bought this house 7 years ago there was an cell phone antenna for the truckers. I wondered about it and my intuition told me to get rid of it..but I didn't. Then my little dog died of a brain tumor and all bets were off. The tower was out of here...It's gone now. But I think we still suffer the damage it caused. it was maybe 100 yards from our home....I recently found out one of my cats has a tumor. We lost 3 cats during the tower days.
I also learned last night that years of working nights is still affecting me...very interesting...Some days are great..some days fatigue hits me like a brick wall......

### caroline — 2013-10-17T23:48:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98178>

Hi Lava and welcome.... you finally made it!

I think your story is so interesting because your DH is a Doctor ..... we think our Doctors can fix everything - when, in reality, we have to fix ourselves.... so very daunting to say the least.

It is great that the magnetico is so positive for you....

I am really glad you are here and getting your life back .....baby step by baby step......

The Q&A on Monday will be huge for us.... see you there......

### Lava — 2013-10-18T22:49:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98293>

I have indeed been gob smacked......all of this is really coming together for me..I love it!!!

Had a long talk with my compounding pharmacist last week..I told her I only wanted progesterone cream. She argued with me for a half an hour about how I needed E3....so now I have a lovely rx for E3 PG and Test. I'm not going to use it...What a waste. It's hard to get through the dogma of others, even as a paying customer.."she" knew what was right and I was an idiot. LOL

Caroline ~ I only do the large hoop earrings if it's a special occasion.....I am a farmer so pretty much without jewels most of the time..One great thing about Big Island living is you can wear your PJ's to town and no one would blink an eye..

Still working on my seafood consumption. Leary of the local fish due to Japan leak...Still try and get down for CT. There is a small sea/saline pond the locals call "ice pond." and yes, it is ccccooooooolllld.

Staring my permaculture garden this weekend..digging in the dirt, barefoot, under the sun...

### SeaHorse — 2013-10-19T01:36:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98301>

Great to hear your story Lava...thanks for writing it down for all of us to learn from.

### Inger — 2013-10-19T08:08:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98317>

Lava you have been through so much pain. I am so glad you are here! I always wanted a permaculture garden too... maybe one day
You are doing so well! Your CT pond sounds lovely - just jump in! You will not regret it

### Lava — 2013-10-20T18:58:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-98416>

Ahhh ten hours of uninterrupted sleep..in darkness, magnetico sleep pad (I think I am ready for 20 g.) Does it get any better...Caroline brought up an interesting topic yesterday that took me back many years ago when I was a bit more "sensitive." I am going to include working on my senses as I heal the rest of myself..It just gets too exciting..Every...single....day!

I am going to continue my journal is sections. I want to expand on some of my health experiences and add some psychic experiences also..I am so blessed. I think I will start on my Hep C journal 1st. This is the one that confuses me the most and if I can hash it out in words I think it will open my eyes up a bit more...until then, I am out gardening my beautiful 2acre tropical farm. Citrus season is going to kill me since I am not doing fruits.....

### Lava — 2013-10-31T19:48:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-99542>

Today I have to laugh at myself but also pat myself on the back. I think I have finally gotten through to my DH..I am in the "I want a perm mode." When I get this way terrible things happen: I end up with a toxic perm. In my google search on perms I find a new perm called a "digital perm"....who knew, right? I am telling my DH about the "new perm" technology and he said, "Are you kidding me? Your going to plug your hair in? What about all the EMF's involved? Don't do it!"......blew my mind and I thought wow, how could I not have thought of that!!! So no digital perm for me, no perm period. But what a great way to find out that all of this is sinking in with DH!!! Victory!!!

### Lava — 2013-12-20T19:09:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-103921>

Two years ago I was bedridden. Today I am up and about at sunrise with unstoppable energy. My rosacea has cleared up, my hormones are really close to being optimal....Lymphs are still sluggish but I am jumping on my trampoline and hoping to get things flowing again....I am just so cotton pickin' happy....

It's Christmas....Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays to everyone...Thank you for all of the info here and the support....

### Inger — 2013-12-20T19:25:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-103922>

I get so happy when I read your journal Lava!!! What a success story you are.. wow! I love how this forum starts to fill up with the most amazing success stories... What it tells us? JACKS PROTOCOLS WORKS...!!!!

I think if Jack got all the warm thoughts and thankfulness many of us carries in our hearts to him, poured over him... he would drown... huh!

### caroline — 2013-12-20T21:50:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lava.8485/post-103929>

Lava - how wonderful! I keep wanting to get a mini trampoline - it is about time I made that Happen!

Keep listening to your Quantum intuition ........ The magic of life and quantum entanglement - just WOW....

How lucky we all are .... Have a wonderful Christmas!

### Curves — 2013-12-21T19:23:37+0200

Lava, thank you so much for starting this thread. I wanted to add my warm thoughts and deep appreciation to Jack, especially today on the Winter Solstice. Since initiating Jack's protocols a year and a half ago, I've gone from depressed and finding it hard to get out of bed in the morning to vivacious and joyful. Although I've been away from the forum for a while, it is not for lack of love for Jack and the community here. Since I last posted, my boyfriend and I have moved from our two small apartments in San Francisco to one nice big home near Portland, Oregon. Although I'm over an hour from the beach now, I can easily run out in the yard and stick my feet directly in the cold damp earth. The cold air and earth are intoxicating -- after a few moments barefoot outside I can feel my energy shift and my body relax. I've also just completed a 3 month public speaking course so I can better publicly articulate my experience (more on that another time). I'm pretty damn excited for all the beautiful things that will reveal themselves in 2014. Love to you all and a big bear hug to you Jack. Muah!

There are high tension electric towers weaving in and out of this area feeding the Intel fabs nearby. The scariest thing is that they actually call the land under the towers "parks!" Seriously, this is land where people walk and hike and kids play -- it makes me crazy each time I see it. Plus, many of the cell phone towers are physically located in a high school.

Inside our home though we are working to minimize exposure to unnatural EMFs and artificial light. Although I'm never 100% comfortable given the local electrification I do feel it's a big step in the right direction.

So good to be in all your company again

# Thread: Merrily Measuring My Magnetism
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 42
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martin — 2013-10-18T00:32:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98184>

I got my meter setup and started measuring in my house. At my studio workbench, there are lots of tools and some electrical devices, so I've been concerned about what my exposure has been.

Using the Swedish National Energy Department's advisory warning of schoolchildren not being exposed to ELF mag fields over **3.0 mG** for long periods of time every day, I set about duplicating a typical exposure when I work here.

My MacBook is showing **.5 mG** (milligauss) at a distance of about an inch off the surface of the keyboard's trackpad. It varies as I move it across the keyboard due to the inner workings of the electronics inside. If I hold the measuring probe down on the keyboard, it goes as high as **15.8 mG** in places, and as little as **1.6 mG** in others. But these measurements fall quickly away as soon as I move the probe away from my trusty laptop. (note to self: look for external keyboard for a laptop?)

12 inches (30 cm) away from the computer, at my torso, it reads **0.00 mG.**

Sweet.

I have external computer speakers with a power supply (heavy thingy that plugs into the home's wiring) that reads **10 mG** at 12 inches. I don't want to spend much time with my head near that thing, so I ran an extension cord in order to place it further from my precious body and mind as not to degrade it too much so I can be ready when a certain Aussie comes to town to check out the compound for the future commune.

Next was a soldering gun that I use to repair and build projects. It's a classic Craftsman model from the '70's that I bought at a garage sale for $3. It's in perfect shape and barely used, so I'm quite proud of it. These tools have been used for generations all over the world to fix and make things and I was floored when it overloaded my meter's setting and I had to go to the next highest range in order to measure it - **180 mG!!!** This was taken at 12 inches from my head, like someone working closely on a project.

Ugh.

So, for generations we've been dehydrating our ass into the state we find ourselves in. Who knew?!

Becker. And now we do.

More later from the Big Head

Summer was decent, albeit rainy as hell, and I have a wonderful tan to show for it. Many a day, I'd strip down to me skivvies (hold on tight, girl!) and work in the garden. The photons were lovely!

GQ has not returned my numerous calls and emails.

Soon, an update. But I gotta have something to brag on besides my fat ass head.

Big Fat Head

### Martin — 2013-10-18T18:38:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98278>

Another tip: I have a decent Klein multimeter (a regular device for measuring all kinds of electrical currents) and found that it was not sensitive enough to be used in conjunction with the MagCheck 95e probe (which can be bought separately - I did!) and ended up going back to Magnetic Sciences and getting the matched multimeter in the kit linked above. I ran side-by-side tests and confirmed that the METEX meter they provide is showing me what I was missing before.

Know better, do better.

I'm off again, with probe in hand, to measure my little corner of the world!

Biggie

### Lava — 2013-10-18T23:10:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98294>

[http://www.magneticsciences.com/MSI95Gaussmeter.html](http://www.magneticsciences.com/MSI95Gaussmeter.html) Just to be sure, is this the one you decided on?

### Martin — 2013-10-18T23:34:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98296>

Hi Lava, yes, that's the one. It has a separate probe (blue boxy thingy in the photo of the case) that you plug into the meter and then hold the probe near an object to test it's field. You rotate the probe slowly to find the highest reading, and you can use it to zero in on a source versus a meter with a three-axis configuration (three probes built into the meter itself that read in three different directions at once, averaging the total score).

There are bennies to a single-axis like this one, and different advantages to the three-axis meters. I like fine tuning my measurements and exploring so I chose this one. It seems like the best for the money and has a great accuracy history.

Good hunting!

BGH

### ATL_Paleo — 2013-10-19T18:54:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98342>

Using a gauss meter, I found that buried power lines are detected. The highest reading was on top of the green transformer box. The reading dropped considerably 30 feet away. The reading continued to drop 50 yards away. Once again, distance is key ... the more distance between you and a source, the less EMF impact.

As to comparing to the impact of residential overhead powerlines to buried power lines, I don't know. But I recall my recent experience of my heart racing while stopped at a traffic under large number of high voltage power lines. So I would infer, the greater amount of voltage (whether overhead or buried), the more EMF we experience.

Great question!

This was a topic brought up by DW at breakfast this morning. She'd been watching a documentary on earthing and brought up our decision to take the earthing sheets off our bed last year due to our concern that we were picking up currents from the overhead and buried power lines near where we ran our ground wire out to the earth, not to mention the fields we were picking up while in bed with our body acting like an "antenna". The EMF webinar was invaluable in cutting thru the bs and speculation.

Now that I have my gaussmeter, I'm going to go out and see what I can see around this yard thing. I figure I need much more sensitive, sophisticated measuring equipment to really get at the facts, but this may show me something.

Having said all that, I take it for granted that when I'm down in the garden or in the field, I'm doing the best I can. If I lived in a neighborhood with lots of houses and power lines running everywhere, I'd find a place where there is no Body Voltage readings. It seems to be the one value where I can really pick up on easily with the equipment I have.

This is all opinion from the...

Big Headed Guy.

I've been using the body voltage meter to reduce the emfs. I was surprised at how high our hot tub in the master bath was eventhoughnwe didn't use it. Turned it off at the circuit. Also, my daughters room is above the garage and was able to bring it down by eliminating the fluorescent lighting in the garage and turning circuit off at night. Still working on this. I am able to work a lot at home although I am an IT software developer. I have found the lowest readings are from the basement or on nice days outside on a covered concrete porch area. I've eliminated all blue light by sitting close to a window.....except for my computer. A couple of days I've tried to use f.lux during the day but it totally kept me awake at night so guess I will try it again to see if same results. Anyone have results like that from using night settings on f.lux during the day?

### nicld — 2013-10-20T23:25:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/merrily-measuring-my-magnetism.8486/post-98438>

Ok, I have been checking the stuff around the house today and it appears that we are not too bad.

When I stand in the middle of our DD's room I get a reading of 0 mG.
Where I sit at home 0.3 mG
My side of the bed 0.1 mG.
the sound machine that I use to drown out the husband's nightly noises 0.6 mG.
Laptop 0.9 mG.
I could barely get a reading off of the TV's.
My alarm clock that does sit above my head on a wood board did read 3.5 mG, just a little high.
The kindle was 0.2 mG
The LED lights in the shelf above the bed was 16.5 mG when on and 13 when off. Think these might have to stay off and unplugged.

Now the bad bad ones.
The space heater off 44 mG on 55 mg. Ughhhh, no more using this to heat up
Our outlet by the phone highest reading was 57 mG.
Power cords behind the DD's chair highest I got was 141 mG EEEEEKKKK. No wonder why the kid seems screwed up. Since her bedroom reading is 0 mG I will be keeping a magnet by her chair and will be trying to up it.
Microwave was 100 mG, no surprise, been keeping that unplugged.
Stove and fridge was not too bad 4 and 3.7 mG.

I still have a couple more things to check but I think this was a pretty good start. Oh and I have rented the meter that Martin recommended.

So what I need to do yet is see about EMF reducing or eliminating power cords. Or maybe I can build something to shield the power bars. Find a different lamp for the bedroom and unplug the LED lights.

The DD gets funding from the county and I think I might look into them buying her a magnetico pad. But I have to really figure out how to teach the hubby about this and get his buy in so we can ask the county for the pad. Right now she is on generic Ritalin to keep her from hurting herself but if I can make her field better and get her off of the drugs that would be a win.

Question - how far away should EMF emitting devises be or is it a accumulation of all that are in the house. I have not found anything on this so I might do an Ask Jack question on this.

I have used f.lux at the lowest setting day or night. If I use the typical daylight setting, that seems too bright for me. Plus, anything I can do to reduce my blue light is a win for me.

FYI - f.lux just came out w/ a new version. I like it. It allows more adjustments. The night setting can be adjusted dimmer than before. I have my evening setting at the lowest setting of 1200K. Very nice.

This enhancement made me think to check my TV. Yup ... I could adjust colors to greatly reduce the amount of blue light.

### caroline — 2013-10-18T08:11:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bg-5-and-bg-11.8489/post-98233>

Sammy - I have posted elsewhere about frozen sushi grade tuna I found in a fish market. It is vac packed in about 4oz pieces and it is beautiful. Each piece is less than $5.00 ...$22.00 Kilo

I just let it thaw slightly and then slice thinly. You can just add lime juice and ginger or whatever you fancy.

I usually buy big cans of salmon from Aldi and also am going to get some of the packs of frozen fish there and make the seafood stew in the recipe section.

Have you tried a MHS? mackerel head smoothie? I buy some small frozen fish from an asian store. I thaw slightly and chop a bit and throw in a blender with corriander and lemon juice and water and blitz the crap out of it!!!

fish stores have really cheap fish heads ... the other day I saw salmon heads for $3.50 K. I would just simmer gently. There is plenty of meat on them. I bet if you got to know a fishmonger - he would give you some for free.
When people have fish filleted - the fishmonger often just throws the bones etc away .... you could make stock.

Hemming just spoke about this somewhere the last day or so......

### Inger — 2013-10-18T10:04:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/bg-5-and-bg-11.8489/post-98245>

Sammy... I would not think too complicated.. just eat wild foods in season, lots of raw fish and wild meats or grassfed. If you have had too much of O6 in your diet until now, just avoid them for a while. Avocado and olive oil are pretty fine anyways, just take care to find very high quality EVOO (freshness is the clue). Or, if you are thinking you have too much O6 in your body, just avoid them all together and eat only fatty fish and coconut oil and fatty meat. Jack has said, if you eat very much fatty fish you can use coconut or other saturated fats with it without a issue, because you get more than enough anyways. That is how I do. I just eat so much fatty fish that I do not need to worry about absorption issues. Then once in a while you can make you a salmon or mackerel sashimi or fish head smoothie and no other fats added, so they go straight to your brain

### Hope — 2013-10-22T16:54:07+0300

# Thread: deplin question
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deplin-question.8491/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Labs
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Julie5 — 2013-10-18T06:57:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deplin-question.8491/post-98225>

Is anyone else on deplin? Is there a cheaper yet still effective alternative?

### ATL_Paleo — 2013-10-18T14:33:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deplin-question.8491/post-98263>

Deplin is the Rx version of methyl folate. Google Kendal Stewart, MD for more info on methyl folate.

Methyl folate is available as an OTC supplement. Most versions are 400 to 800mcg whereas Rx version is 7.5 or 15mg.

Kendal Stewart promotes a supplement version at 5mg per cap. Watch this video; it briefly compares Rx to supplement version. [http://vimeo.com/55965134](http://vimeo.com/55965134)

If you Google, there are several other companies that offer supplement version in higher strength than 800mcg (0.8mg).

### Julie5 — 2013-10-18T16:15:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/deplin-question.8491/post-98269>

Thanks! I'll give a read/listen.

# Thread: How do I get to ketosis?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-get-to-ketosis.8492/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Julie5 — 2013-10-18T07:10:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-get-to-ketosis.8492/post-98231>

It seems to me that on the leptin /rx I am supposed to eat just seafood/meat and fat. Is that right? I tested for ketosis yesterday, and I'm not very far along that route, but I've been eating some veggies (asparagus, mushrooms, carrots, beets, spinach, celery, onions). I have very high HDL, and according to JK it's OK to eat the nightshades with a high HDL. i only eat small portion of one veggie at dinner only. Should I cut out ALL veggies and stick with just fat/protein?

### Inger — 2013-10-18T09:27:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-get-to-ketosis.8492/post-98239>

Julie I think if you get under 20-30 grams of CH it is fine as long as you eat veggies in season? You need to count the carbs in the beginning, cooked carrots easily have quite a lot of them etc. Maybe try leafy greens? I myself eat almost zero veggies, I chew on raw dirty carrots from the garden once in a while, to get bacterias in for my gut. And I eat wild raw dried mushrooms, very seldom I fry them gently too in butter. I eat raw onions almost every day, and I like organic cucumber for hydration. Actually my only real carb source is wild raw berries but the berries that grow here has very little carbs in them. I think Jack has said he covers his veggies in fat  so always eat enough fat! I eat so much fat if the calorie theory was right I should be 300 pounds by now..lol But I am just fine

### Jack Kruse — 2013-10-18T16:07:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-get-to-ketosis.8492/post-98266>
